recorder_not_excluded.title: Lean Utility Meter not excluded from Recorder
recorder_not_excluded.description:
The entity `{entity_id}` is not excluded from the Recorder in your `configuration.yaml`.

To prevent intermediate values from bloating your database, please add it to your recorder's exclude configuration:

```yaml
recorder:
  exclude:
    entities:
      - {entity_id}
```
Don't worry, your historical charts will display correctly since `lean_utility_meter` saves consolidated stats directly to the long-term database.

unexpected_points_for_cycle.title: Lean Utility Meter has more points than expected
unexpected_points_for_cycle.description:
The entity `{entity_id}` has `{actual_points}` long-term points, but based on cycle `{cycle}` and first recorded point `{first_point}`, the expected count is `{expected_points}` (tolerance `{tolerance}`).

This usually means extra points were written for one or more cycles. You can run `lean_utility_meter.thin_history` to consolidate historical points.

If this is intentional, ignore this repair.
